title: Choose Instructions, Skills, Plugins, Hooks, or MCP · MCP Build Room
summary: Route recurring agent needs to the smallest durable extension surface. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of an extension-surface decision matrix while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate one-turn prompts, repository instructions, reusable skills, enforcement hooks, plugins, and external tools by scope.
Use AGENTS.md or equivalent repository guidance for durable local conventions.
Use a skill for a reusable workflow, expertise, scripts, references, or assets.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""Local MCP protocol and tool-contract portfolio."""

# Add typed, bounded protocol increments below.

steps.title: Commit to the mission model
steps.instruction:
Use a changed workshop case derived from this module: agent ext surface choice. Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.

steps.title: Extend the cumulative artifact
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-plugin-fit-c0sqoa: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Plugin Fit into observable performance evidence.

content.code:
agent-ext-plugin-fit-c0sqoa:
  verify: [replace with a deterministic check]
  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

stimulus.title: Plugin Fit failure evidence
stimulus.caption: A plausible visible result conflicts with the governing contract and requires a cause-level repair.

lines.label: observed

lines.label: required

options.text: Reject the unsupported conclusion, name the violated Plugin Fit condition, repair the responsible layer, and rerun the boundary trace.
Keep the plausible output and hide the assumption to avoid confusing the stakeholder.
Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Defend the transferred model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Plugin Fit applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Use a plugin to distribute skills, connectors, hooks, and presentation assets as one installable unit.
